brief_notes: Outstanding multimodal study linking BBB modulation to synaptic plasticity through converging evidence from intravital microscopy, ELISA, electrophysiology, pharmacology, RNA-seq, and human DCE-MRI. Tables are quantitative throughout: albumin ELISA with fold-changes and p-values, SEP amplitudes pre/post, pharmacological blocker effects with permeability index, GO enrichment with FDR values, and human K-trans values. The mechanistic dissection (CNQX/AP5 vs mBCD vs SJN) is elegant. The photothrombosis comparison contextualizes physiological vs pathological BBB changes effectively.
